title: Gooey Golden Egyptian Cheese Kebabs
description: A sweet and cheesy Egyptian dish featuring Thai bird chili, perfect for kids and adults alike, this recipe is ayurvedic sattvic friendly and cooked on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together honey, kombu cold extract, and chopped Thai bird chili.
Add the sliced halloumi cheese to the bowl and toss to coat with the honey mixture.
Thread the cheese cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the cedar plank with coconut oil and place the skewers on the plank.
Grill the skewers for 5 minutes per side, or until the cheese is golden brown and melted.
Serve the kebabs hot with pineapple chunks on the side.
Garnish with fresh herbs and serve immediately.
